title: CANoe Knowledge Base Page Schema (v3 — agent-facing)
description: Authoritative schema for a single knowledge base page. Derived from inspection of the corpus. Use this to validate or write new pages. Note: actual corpus has some legacy v2 fields; see _v2_legacy_compat block below.

page_type.description: One of 6 page types. 'notes' is a legacy catch-all; 'selector' is under-represented in the corpus (see capability_manifest §6 K2).

name.description: Title of the page (function name, control name, keyword, etc.).

title.description: Optional: full descriptive title. Often equals 'name'.

version.description: CANoe version. 'extras' for hand-curated team docs.

source.description: Original HTM file path or 'hand_curated_v1' / 'synthetic_v1' for non-CHM sources.

syntax.description: List of C/CAPL signature lines. Empty for non-function pages.

description.description: Plain text describing the function/page. May be string or list (legacy).

intro.description: For concept pages: paragraphs before the first h2 section.

parameters.description: Function parameters as {name, type, description}. Empty for parameterless functions.

return.description: Return value description. Empty when source doesn't state one. May be missing on legacy pages — fall back to first token of syntax[0].

availability.description: Version matrix: list of rows; first row often product names.

selectors.description: Selector list (for event pages and dedicated selector pages). Items may use {name, desc} or {row} shapes.

tables.description: For notes/concept pages: tabular content as list-of-rows-of-cells.

property_references.description: Panel-only: structured extraction of UI property names / symbol refs / group names.

_v2_legacy_compat.description: Pages extracted by the v2 pipeline may have these legacy issues. Agents should be tolerant.

issues.issue: v15 pages often mis-tagged as 'notes'; check syntax[0] to disambiguate.
Selector pages mis-tagged as 'notes'; data is in 'selectors' field.
v12 parameters may be incomplete; v2 patch brought coverage to 81.3%.
Panel pages have no code blocks; use property_references instead.
v15 'return' may be empty; first token of syntax[0] is the return type.
Some Panel property_references have encoding artifacts; strip non-printable chars.
